memberdef.name: XSPIPS_TPM_RESP_MAX_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 4096 /* Maximum possible TPM response size in bytes */

memberdef.name: XSPIPS_TPM_REQ_MAX_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 1024 /* Maximum possible TPM request size in bytes */

briefdescription.para: This function reads vendor identification information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is pointer to read status

briefdescription.para: This function sets the TPM status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is to be written to status register

briefdescription.para: This function gets TPM access configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is pointer to get access configuration

briefdescription.para: This function sets TPM access configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is set access configuration value

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from TPM FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is to be read to data FIFO
is the number of bytes to read.

briefdescription.para: This function write the data TPM FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is data pointer to be written to FIFO.
is the number of bytes to read.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSpiPs *SpiPtr, u32 Address, u8 *TxBuf, u8 *RxBuf, u16 Length)
memberdef.name: SpiPsTpmTransfer

briefdescription.para: This function sets TPM access configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
register address
is pointer to transmit buffer
is pointer to receive buffer
is transfer length

briefdescription.para: This function sets TPM access configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPIPS driver component to use.
is pointer to transmit buffer
is pointer to receive buffer
is data transfer length
is a pointer to the Spi Instance.
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the Spi TPM example.
This file contains a design example using the SPI driver (XSpiPs) in polled mode and hardware device with a Trusted Platform Module device.

detaileddescription.para:
This example sends TPM commands to device based on user inputs and displays the response.
None.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sg 04/02/21 Initial release 3.9 sb 07/05/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. pre 10/23/25 Fixed bug in TPM command transmission 3.14 vlt 12/18/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
